_comment: KHONG CHINH SUA: TEP DUOC TAO BOI STACLOUD
name: Golang Generic
author: congdongamazon@gmail.com
description: Golang Generic Egg cho STACloud, dung de tai va build ung dung Go thanh file thuc thi.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# golang generic package

if [ ! -d /mnt/server/ ]; then
    mkdir -p /mnt/server/
fi

export GOPATH=/mnt/server/go
export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin:${GOPATH}/bin
cd /mnt/server

go env -w GOPATH=${GOPATH}

go install ${GO_PACKAGE}@latest

PACKAGE_NAME=$(basename ${GO_PACKAGE})
if [ -f "${GOPATH}/bin/${EXECUTABLE}" ]; then
    cp -f "${GOPATH}/bin/${EXECUTABLE}" /mnt/server/
elif [ -f "${GOPATH}/bin/${PACKAGE_NAME}" ]; then
    cp -f "${GOPATH}/bin/${PACKAGE_NAME}" "/mnt/server/${EXECUTABLE}"
else
    echo "Unable to locate built executable in ${GOPATH}/bin"
    exit 1
fi

variables.name: Go Package
variables.description: Go package to get and build

variables.name: Executable
variables.description: This is the executable from the build.
